kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"index": "fp-events", "query": {"language": "kuery", "query": "event.dataset:system.auth AND (event.type:(denied OR failure) OR event.code:4625) OR (event.dataset:windows.security AND event.code:(4625 OR 4771))"}, "filter": []}
